failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to solvent crystallization at lower temperatures
failure_modes.mitigation: Maintain system temperature above crystallization point
Implement regular cleaning protocol and monitor pressure drop

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.08326 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct thermal cycling test from 100°C to 130°C to check for solvent crystallization
Perform long-term stability test at 120°C to assess reactor tube fouling over time
